---
name: "🐞 Bug Report"
about: "Report an issue or unexpected behavior"
title: "🐞 [Brief, descriptive title of the Bug Report]"
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

# 🐞 Bug 

## 🧾 Summary
**Describe the bug clearly and concisely.**  
Example: "The 'Save' button does not respond when clicked on the profile page."

## 🪜 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to [page/feature]
2. Click on [button/link]
3. Observe the issue: [what happens]

## 🧠 Expected Behavior
**Describe what you expected to happen.**  
Example: "When clicking 'Save', the user profile should be updated and a success message should appear."

## ⚙️ Actual Behavior
**Describe what actually happens.**  
Example: "Clicking 'Save' does nothing, and no message is displayed."

## 🧩 Environment
| Environment Detail | Value |
|---------------------|-------|
| Device | [Desktop / Mobile] |
| OS | [Windows / macOS / Linux / Android / iOS] |
| Browser | [Chrome / Firefox / Safari / Edge] |
| App Version | [v1.2.3] |
| Branch | [develop / main / feature-x] |

## 📸 Screenshots / Recordings
Attach screenshots, logs, or videos if available.

## 🧪 Severity & Priority
| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **Severity** | [Critical / High / Medium / Low] |
| **Priority** | [P0 / P1 / P2 / P3] |

## 🔍 Additional Notes
Add any other information or context that might help identify the issue (e.g., related commits, suspected cause).

## ✅ Definition of Done
- [ ] Bug can be reproduced consistently.
- [ ] Root cause identified and fixed.
- [ ] Unit/integration tests added or updated.
- [ ] QA validated the fix on staging.
- [ ] Issue closed in GitHub.
